description: LMM.best V2 - Enhanced with filtering, search, compare, and detailed benchmark sections

userStories.title: Add tier filter buttons to leaderboard
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter models by tier (S/A/B/C) to focus on specific ranking levels.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter buttons above table: All, S Tier, A Tier, B Tier
Active filter has highlighted state
Table updates instantly on filter click
Model count updates to show filtered total
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: tier-filters component with active state styling

userStories.title: Add search functionality to leaderboard
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search for specific models by name or vendor.
acceptanceCriteria: Search input field with placeholder 'Search models...'
Filters table in real-time as user types
Search is case-insensitive
Matches against both model name and vendor
Empty state message when no results
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: search-box component with real-time filtering using useMemo

userStories.title: Add benchmark methodology section
userStories.description: As a user, I want to understand how models are scored by reading the methodology.
acceptanceCriteria: New 'Methodology' section between leaderboard and reviews
Shows 4 benchmarks: MMMU, MathVista, ChartQA, AI2D with descriptions
Score weightings displayed (percentage bars)
Clean card layout with icons
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: benchmarks-grid with 4 cards showing benchmark weights

userStories.title: Add model comparison feature
userStories.description: As a user, I want to compare up to 3 models side by side.
acceptanceCriteria: Checkbox on each leaderboard row to select for comparison
Compare button appears when 2+ models selected
Modal/panel shows side-by-side comparison of specs
Can clear selection
Max 3 models enforced
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: compare checkbox on each row, modal with side-by-side table

userStories.title: Add smooth page load skeleton
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see loading skeletons while content loads for better UX.
acceptanceCriteria: Skeleton UI for leaderboard rows (8 skeleton rows)
Skeleton for review cards (4 skeleton cards)
Animated shimmer effect on skeletons
Skeletons visible for 500ms minimum on page load
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: SkeletonRow and SkeletonCard components with shimmer animation
